title: Advances in Computer Games 14
text: Home * Conferences * Advances in Computer Games 14 < Prev Next > Snellius Building [1] Advances in Computer Games 14 , from July 1 to 3, 2015 , Snellius Building [2] [3] , Leiden University , Leiden , The Netherlands , in conjunction with the WCCC 2015 , WCSC 2015 , and the 18th Computer Olympiad . ACG is the conference of the ICGA .
